hero.title: Rnu ɣer IATF
hero.lead: Tameddakelt teldi. Llan waṭas n iberdan i wakken ad tettekkiḍ, ama tettkel ɣef teknasit tamɛawnant, tebniḍ-d aselkim yettwafen, tsuqleḍ-t, tettεerḍeḍ-t neɣ teṭṭfeḍ-t deg usenfaṛ. Timsaltin d tmuɣliwin tḍerru-d sdat n medden deg GitHub d Discord.

header.title: Abrid i wakken ad d-tefkeḍ afus n tallelt

items: Suter-d aɣawas. Ma tufiḍ-d kra n tɣawsiwin i d-yettaǧǧan ur d-tezmireḍ ara ad t-teṭṭfeḍ s uselkim agejdan, ceggeɛ-as-tt-id s usekcem n yisteqsiyen.
Ajeṛṛeb d tmuɣli. Ɛerḍet deg usenfaṛen n IATF s tesnilsit n tallalt i tesseqdacem, rret-d ayen ixeddmen d wayen ur nxeddem ara, terrem tiɣawsiwin srid ɣer usebter-nni yemsefhamen.
Bniɣ. Awi-d iɣeblan deg kra n usebter n IATF, ceggeɛ-d tiɣawsiwin n usekles, neɣ awi-d aɣawas d amsenǧer-is amatu.
Ḥrez iman-ik. Iseggasen i yellan tikwal ḥwaǧen amεellem amaynut.

header.title: Anda ixeddem IATF deg umkan n medden

items: GitHub. Tiɣawsiwin, tiɣriwin n usekles, isefka, d isekkilen n usenfaṛ.
Ur nemsefham ara. Ameslay n tudert, aseɣti, d tuttriwin ur nelli d tinnaḍin.
Imeyili. Aseqdec contact@iatf.cc ma ulac GitHub neɣ Discord.

header.title: Fren tasna i d-yettemcabin d wamek i tebɣiḍ ad d-tefkeḍ afus n tallelt

paragraphs: Ikanalen-nni merra ttawin-d ayen i d-yettawin ɣer yiwet n tmuɣli taɣelnawt akked yiwen n usebter aɣelnaw.
